description: A quiet residential area with leafy streets and hidden gardens.

challenges.title: Rose Hunt
challenges.description: Find a garden or balcony with roses and count how many different colors you can spot. Bonus: ask a local what their favorite variety is.

challenges.title: Café Stranger
challenges.description: Walk into the nearest café, order something you've never tried before, and sit outside for at least 10 minutes watching the street.

challenges.title: Oldest Building
challenges.description: Walk two blocks in any direction and find what you think is the oldest building. Photograph it and note the architectural style.

challenges.title: Hidden Courtyard
challenges.description: Bernese arcades often hide inner courtyards. Find one accessible courtyard, step inside, and sketch or describe what you see.

challenges.title: Local Market Find
challenges.description: Find a small local shop (not a chain) and buy one edible item you can't identify by sight alone. Taste it.

description: A village at the end of the line with a medieval castle overlooking the valley.

challenges.title: Castle Silhouette
challenges.description: Find a viewpoint where you can photograph Worb Castle. Extra points if you catch it with the Bernese Alps in the background.

challenges.title: River Worble
challenges.description: Locate the Worble river and walk along it for at least 5 minutes. Find something that surprises you — a bird, a fish, an unexpected structure.

challenges.title: Village Bench
challenges.description: Find a public bench in the village center, sit down for 5 minutes, and write three observations about the people passing by.

challenges.title: Farm Stand
challenges.description: Find an unattended farm stand (Hofladen) with honor-system payment and buy something from it.

challenges.title: Church Bell
challenges.description: Find the village church and wait for the next bell chime. Count the strikes and figure out what time they say.

description: A multicultural district with vibrant street art and a strong community spirit.

challenges.title: Street Art Safari
challenges.description: Find three pieces of street art or murals within a 500m radius. Photograph each one and rank them by your favorite.

challenges.title: Five Languages
challenges.description: Walk around the neighborhood and collect greetings in five different languages from shop signs, menus, or people you meet.

challenges.title: International Bite
challenges.description: Find a restaurant or takeaway serving food from a country you've never visited and order something from their menu.

challenges.title: Playground Theory
challenges.description: Find a playground and observe the equipment. What's the most creative piece? How old do you think it is?

challenges.title: Corner Shop
challenges.description: Find the most interesting small corner shop, step inside and strike up a conversation with the person behind the counter.

description: Home to YB's stadium and a sprawling urban district under constant transformation.

challenges.title: Yellow & Black Spotter
challenges.description: Spot someone wearing BSC Young Boys colors (yellow and black). If they look friendly, give them a thumbs up.

challenges.title: Stadium Selfie
challenges.description: Get as close to the Wankdorf stadium as you can and take a selfie with it. Bonus if a tram is visible in the frame.

challenges.title: Under Construction
challenges.description: Find an active construction site. Read the permit board if there is one — what is being built and when does it finish?

challenges.title: Migros vs Coop
challenges.description: Find one Migros AND one Coop within 10 minutes of walking. Compare the price of the same item in each store.

challenges.title: Tram Watch
challenges.description: Return to the tram stop and watch three trams pass. Note which lines they are and photograph the most interesting-looking one.

description: A lively end-of-line stop with open spaces, families, and classic Swiss neighborhood charm.

challenges.title: Dog Count
challenges.description: Spend 10 minutes near the tram stop and count every dog that walks by. Bonus: learn one dog's name.

challenges.title: Parklife
challenges.description: Find a patch of green space and observe what people are doing in it. List at least four different activities.

challenges.title: Sound Map
challenges.description: Stand still for 2 minutes with your eyes closed. Identify five distinct sounds you hear. What story do they tell about this place?

challenges.title: Window Garden
challenges.description: Walk one block and find the most impressive window box or balcony garden. Photograph it — what plants can you name?

challenges.title: Bakery Quest
challenges.description: Find a traditional Swiss bakery and order a Gipfeli or Butterzopf. Eat it before you get back on the tram.
